user.title: Rinnai Touch module
user.description: Enter the address of the Rinnai/Brivis WiFi module. The module accepts only one local TCP client at a time: stop Homebridge or any other local client using it before connecting. Validation makes a single passive connection and only reads status data.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the WiFi module.
data_description.port: TCP port of the module's local status service.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the module.
error.no_status_received: Connected, but no valid Rinnai status data arrived. Check that this is the module address and that no other local client (for example Homebridge) is connected.
error.invalid_host: Enter a host name or IP address.

abort.already_configured: This module address is already configured.
